_meta.source: docs/map/TORONTO-MAP-SPEC-v2.md §7 (verified July 2026 in user's research session)
_meta.purpose: Free geometry sourcing options evaluated for the Toronto filler/hero building pipeline. §7's own decision (also formalized in Addendum A.3/A.4): filler massing comes from Cadmapper/OSM footprints extruded per §2's projection; hero meshes (CN Tower, Rogers Centre) are hand-built from primitives, using CC models only as proportion reference — never shipped as geometry.

sources.name: Cadmapper
sources.license: Free tier: ≤1 km² extracts (heights included); also a free whole-Toronto 2D road DXF — no formal license name given in spec
sources.decision: Pull 4 free tiles: King & Bay, rail lands/CN, Yonge Dundas→Queen, Yonge & Sheppard — covers every hero zone, $0
sources.src: TORONTO-MAP-SPEC-v2.md §7 (verified July 2026 in user's research session)
sources.notes: free ≤1 km² extracts (DXF/SketchUp/Rhino/Illustrator, heights incl.), free whole-Toronto 2D road DXF

sources.name: OSM via Overpass/osmnx
sources.decision: the programmatic route; the projection eats GeoJSON directly
sources.src: TORONTO-MAP-SPEC-v2.md §7 (verified July 2026 in user's research session)

sources.name: City of Toronto 3D Massing
sources.license: unknown (portal retired; not stated in spec)
sources.decision: Grab if convenient, don't block on it — not the primary pipeline
sources.src: TORONTO-MAP-SPEC-v2.md §7 (verified July 2026 in user's research session)
sources.notes: the ideal source but the portal page is now marked Retired; archived copies live at TMU/York geospatial centres

sources.name: Sketchfab CC-BY CN Tower models
sources.src: TORONTO-MAP-SPEC-v2.md §7 (verified July 2026 in user's research session)
sources.notes: CC-BY meshes exist (42k-87k tris per §5) but are heavy, unstyled, and one is a Google Earth rip that should not ship; proportion reference only, per §5's hero-model decision
